candidates.note: The Town Hall, Market Place, Tamworth Built in 1701 by Thomas Guy, M.P. for the town. It is of mellow brick with arcades at ground level, large Jacobean windows and a steeply-pitched roof topped by a cupola. (The Shell Guide to England, 1970) It once housed the Butter Market and was used to store the towns fire engine.
